'''zadhaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylofuranose|xylofuranose]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylofuranose|xylofuranose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadhaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædhæhæth|zædhæhæth]] || [[word:zædhæhæj|zædhæhæj]] || [[word:zædhæhæsh|zædhæhæsh]] || [[word:zædhæhæ|zædhæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadhadhahath|zadhadhahath]] || [[word:zadhadhahaj|zadhadhahaj]] || [[word:zadhadhahash|zadhadhahash]] || [[word:zadhadhaha|zadhadhaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadhahath|zadhahath]] || [[word:zadhahaj|zadhahaj]] || [[word:zadhahash|zadhahash]] || [[word:zadhaha|zadhaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadhafhath|zadhafhath]] || [[word:zadhafhaj|zadhafhaj]] || [[word:zadhafhash|zadhafhash]] || [[word:zadhafhaf|zadhafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadhahatha|zadhahatha]] || [[word:zadhahaja|zadhahaja]] || [[word:zadhahasha|zadhahasha]] || [[word:zadhahaka|zadhahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadhahath|zadhahath]] || [[word:zadhahaj|zadhahaj]] || [[word:zadhahash|zadhahash]] || [[word:zadhaha|zadhaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadhahathal|zadhahathal]] || [[word:zadhahajal|zadhahajal]] || [[word:zadhahashal|zadhahashal]] || [[word:zadhahakal|zadhahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadhahathatha|zadhahathatha]] || [[word:zadhahajaja|zadhahajaja]] || [[word:zadhahashasha|zadhahashasha]] || [[word:zadhahaka|zadhahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadhahathan|zadhahathan]] || [[word:zadhahajan|zadhahajan]] || [[word:zadhahashan|zadhahashan]] || [[word:zadhahakan|zadhahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadhahathaoro|zadhahathaoro]] || [[word:zadhahajaoro|zadhahajaoro]] || [[word:zadhahashaoro|zadhahashaoro]] || [[word:zadhahakaoro|zadhahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
